description: Italian-French criminal organization founded in Rome in 1973, operating between France and Italy during the early 1970s. Engaged in drug trafficking and lucrative kidnappings, becoming the first organized crime group to exert territorial control in Rome. It was composed of French ex-convicts from the Marseille milieu, linked to the French Connection.

country_links.evidence_quote: operante tra Francia e Italia durante la prima metà degli anni settanta
country_links.context: The organization operated in France, as stated in the opening sentence.

country_links.evidence_quote: prima di spostarsi in Portogallo dove fu arrestato per una rapina
country_links.context: A member of the organization, Maffeo Bellicini, moved to Portugal and was arrested for a robbery there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Bellicini decise di trasferirsi in Svizzera dove realizzò una serie di colpi milionari
country_links.context: A member of the organization, Maffeo Bellicini, moved to Switzerland and carried out robberies there.

country_links.evidence_quote: facendo da ponte tra la Turchia e l'occidente
country_links.context: The organization acted as a bridge between Turkey and the West in drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: Jacques Berenguer riuscì a fuggire a New York dove venne poi arrestato nel 1980 ed estradato in Italia
country_links.context: A member of the organization, Jacques Berenguer, fled to New York where he was later arrested.
